nasb.text: In my distress I called upon the Lord, Yes, I cried to my God; And from His temple He heard my voice, And my cry for help came into His ears.

esv.text: “In my distress I called upon the Lord; to my God I called. From his temple he heard my voice, and my cry came to his ears.

cnv.text: 急難臨到我的時候，我求告耶和華， 我向我的　神呼求； 他從殿中聽了我的聲音， 我的呼求進了他的耳中。

ccb.text: “我在苦难中呼求耶和华， 向我的上帝求助， 祂从殿中垂听我的呼求， 我的声音达到祂耳中。
